english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
We look at what happened in the past to try to know what will happen in the future. We see that things happened in a certain way before. We see that when one thing happens, another thing often follows. Because of this, we think that if we see the first thing happen again, the second thing will also happen. This is how we try to know what is coming next. We use what we know to make a guess about what we do not know.

The hard question is this. Can we know for sure what will happen just because we know what happened before? We want to believe that the world works in a way that stays the same. We want to believe that the ways things move and change do not change from one day to the next. But how can we be sure that the way things were is the way things will always be? There is no way to look at the past and see every thing that could ever happen.

Some people say that we can trust our guesses. They say that the world does not change its ways. They say that if we look at many things that happened, we can see a path. To them, the past is like a map that shows us where we are going. They think that if we have enough information about what was, we can find the truth about what will be. They believe that the world follows a way that does not change without a reason.

Other people say that we cannot trust these guesses. They say that just because something happened many many times does not mean it will happen again. They say that a new thing can come along and change everything in a moment. They think that the past is not a map, but just a story of things that are now gone. They say that we can never know the future because the world can always do something new that we have never seen before. They think that our way of thinking is a way to make us feel safe when we are actually in a world that is not certain.

english_query: how the kind of person you are matters more than following rules
ugf_response:
First, we see that a person looks at the ways many other people say you should act and also thinks about who they are inside, about the sort of person they want to be, and about what feels right to them. The situation is that many people tell us there are certain set ways that we should follow, like a group of things that are said to be good to do, and at the same time we hear that the kind of person we are, the sort of good or kind feelings we hold, might be even more important than just doing the same set ways.

The hard question that comes up is this: when a choice must be made, should a person try first to be the sort of good, caring person they feel they are, even if that means not doing exactly what the set ways say, or should they try first to do exactly what the set ways tell them, even if that sometimes feels like it does not fit the feeling of being a good person inside? The hard part is that both sides seem to have good reasons. On one hand, the idea of being a good person inside can show us to act in ways that help others and keep us telling what is true, but on the other hand, the set ways are there to keep many people safe and to make life easier for a large group, and breaking them can cause a bad state or hurt.

One group of people says that the sort of person you are matters more. They say that if you are kind, telling what is true, and caring in your heart, you will usually find a way to act that is right for the situation, even if it means not following a set way that feels wrong. They point to times when the set ways have not been right or have caused pain, and they say that a good inside the person can see those problems and act better.

Another group says that the set ways matter more. They say that when many people follow the same ways, it makes life easy to guess and safe, and that a single person feeling of being good can be different for each person, which can lead to big trouble if everyone just follows their own feeling. They note that the set ways often come from a long time of trying to keep groups together.

A third group tries to put together the two ideas. They say that a person should try to be good inside, but also try to follow the set ways unless those ways clearly cause hurt or go against what feels right. They say that this middle lets us keep the being safe of the group while also being true to the sort of person we want to be.

These different answers come from what each person sees in their own life. Those who have felt hurt by not right set ways may trust their inside good feeling more. Those who have lived in places where breaking the set ways caused trouble may trust the set ways more. And those who have seen both good and bad in each side may try to hold both ideas together, hoping to keep order while still being true to the sort of person they want to be.

english_query: how to think about what could happen and how likely it is
ugf_response: First, we look at the things that might happen in the future. We think about all the different ways things could go. Then, we try to guess how often each of those ways might come true. Some things happen very often, like the sun coming up in the morning. We know this will happen, so we say it is a sure thing. Other things happen only a few times, like finding money on the ground. We know this is not a sure thing. When we think about what could happen, we do not just write down every way it could go. We also think about how much we believe each one will happen. This helps us make better choices. If we know something is very much going to happen, we get ready for it. If we know something is not going to happen much, we might not worry as much. This way of thinking helps us see the world more clearly. It lets us plan for the things that are most real and not spend too much time on things that are just dreams. We use this idea every day when we decide to carry a rain cover or stay home. We look at the sky and think about rain. If the sky is dark, we think rain is a sure thing. If the sky is bright, we think rain is not a sure thing. This simple thinking helps us live our lives in a good way.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response:
The first idea is that a person sometimes looks at a group of choices and thinks there are only two ways to go. This person thinks that if one way is bad, then the other way must be the only good way. This is what the person says is true.

The second idea is what the person thinks follows from this. They think that if you believe there are only two ways, you will make a bad choice. You might pick a bad way because you think the other way is the only other choice. You will not see the other ways that might be better.

The third idea is whether the way of thinking is good. This way of thinking is not good. It is not a good way to think because it is not the whole truth. If there are more than two ways to do something, but you only see two, you are not seeing the whole picture. You are missing many things that could help you. This way of thinking leads to doing things in a way that is not right because it does not look at all the things that could happen.

english_query: how we build a picture of the world from small pieces of what we see
ugf_response: First, we use our eyes to see small parts of things around us. We see a red shape and a round shape. Then our mind puts these small parts together. It makes a whole picture in our head. This picture is not the real thing but it is close to it. We do this all the time. When we see a long nose and big ears, we think of a big gray animal with a long nose. We build a big idea from many small sights. This helps us know what is happening without looking at every tiny part. It saves us time and lets us move through the world. But sometimes our mind puts pieces together in a way that is not right. Then our picture is not true. So we must check our picture against what we see next. If new pieces do not fit, we change our picture. This way we keep our view of the world close to the real world.

english_query: why who someone is to you changes what you should do for them

Person one: So if I have more than one thing to give, I should give more to the person I love?

Person two: Yes. You use your things to keep those close to you safe and happy. A stranger is just a person you do not know, but a friend is part of your own life.

Person one: Does this mean I am not doing the same thing for the people I do not know?

Person two: It is not about doing the same thing for everyone. It is about how we build a world where people who care for each other stay strong. We give more to those who are part of our circle.

english_query: why a true belief for bad reasons is not the same as knowing
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means to have a thought that is true. To have a true thought means that what you think is the same as what is real in the world. Second, we must think about why you have that thought. Sometimes, you have a true thought because you saw the real thing. Other times, you have a true thought because you made a guess that was right by chance. Third, we see that there is a big way things are not the same. If you see a tree and say there is a tree, you are seeing the truth. If you close your eyes and guess there is a tree, and there is a tree, your thought is true but it came from a bad way of thinking. The way after the third thing, we must look at why this matters for what it means to know something. To know something means that your thought is tied to the real world in a strong way. If your thought is true only because of chance, then you are not really held by the truth. You just happened to hit it by chance. The way after the way after the third thing, we can see that knowing needs a good way of getting to the truth. A good way means your thought is built on things that are real and can be seen or felt. A bad way means your thought is built on things that are not real or are just chance. So, even if a thought is true, if it comes from a bad way of thinking, it is not the same as knowing.

english_query: why being sure about something does not make it right
ugf_response:
Sometimes a person feels very sure about a thing. They feel a strong feeling inside that what they think is the truth. This feeling can be very great and can move them in a big way. It can make them feel as if they have seen the thing with their own eyes. However, feeling sure is not the same as being right.

To understand this, we must look at how we get what we think is true. We get our thoughts from what we see, what we hear, and what we have learned before. But our eyes and ears can do things that are not right. We can see things that are not there, or we can see things in a way that is not the way they really are. We can hear things that are not true, or we can hear only part of what someone said.

Another way we get our thoughts is from what we already believe. If we already have a strong way of looking at the world, we will only look for things that fit that way. If we see something that does not fit, we might ignore it or change it in our minds so that it fits. This is like wearing glasses that only let in certain colors. You think the whole world is that color, but it is only your glasses making it look that way.

Also, our brains like to make things simple. The world is very big and very hard to understand. It is easy to make a guess that makes sense and feels good. When we make a guess that feels good, our brain gives us a good feeling. This feeling of being sure is often just our brain being happy that it found a simple answer. It is not a sign that the answer is the truth.

So, we must remember that a strong feeling inside does not change the truth of the world. A thing can be wrong even if every person in the room feels sure it is right. To find the truth, we should not look at how we feel. Instead, we must look at what we can see and what we can show to be true, and we must always be ready to change our minds when we find something new.

english_query: how we build a picture of the world from small pieces of what we see
ugf_response: First, we notice that we cannot see all of the world at one time. Then we take each little thing that we see, such as a shape, a sound, a smell, a color, or a feel, and we keep it in our mind. Next, we let those little things sit together in our mind like parts of a picture made of many small bits. When we put the bits together, the sides start to fit together and a bigger shape appears. That bigger shape is what we call our view of the world. Each time we see a new little thing, we add it to the picture and the view can change a little. Over time, as we add more and more parts, the view becomes clearer and we can tell more about the world around us. This is how we make a picture of the world from small pieces of what we see.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
Person 1: I am trying to decide if I should speak up in the meeting. How do I know what will happen if I do?

Person 1: So I should guess how they will act resting on what they did in the past?

Person 1: What if I am wrong about what they want?

Person 2: Then you learn. Next time you will know more. It is better to try and learn than to do nothing.

english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who finds one hundred pieces of gold on the ground. They feel good and happy. Now imagine a person who loses one hundred pieces of gold from their pocket. They feel very bad and sad. Even though the number of pieces is the same, the bad feeling from what is gone is much bigger than the good feeling from what is found. This happens to many people in many ways. It is not just about money. It can be about how we act or how we make choices.

The hard question is why our minds work this way. Why does the pain of what is gone feel so much stronger than the good feeling from what is found that is the very same size? If we were thinking in a way that only looked at the numbers, the two things should feel the same. But our minds do not work like machines that only look at numbers. Our minds have a way of looking at things that makes losing feel like a great weight, while winning feels like a small light.

Some people say this happens because of how we stay alive. Long ago, if a person lost food or a place to sleep, they might die. If they found extra food, they would just be a little more happy. But losing what you need is a very big thing that can end your life. So, our minds learned to pay much more attention to things that could hurt us. We are built to look for things that can kill us and to run from them. This makes us feel a very large part of fear when we might lose something.

Other people say this is because of how we see the world. When we win, we think we are doing what we should do, but we do not think about it for very long. But when something is gone, it feels like something is wrong with us or our way of life. The thing that is gone feels like a wrong thing that we must fix. This makes the feeling of what is gone stay in our heads for a long time. Because of this, we often choose to do nothing rather than take a chance where we might lose, even if the chance to win is very great.

english_query: why the way a question is asked can change the answer you give
ugf_response: First, we look at how people hear words. When someone asks a question, the words they use put ideas into our heads. Then we see that if the words make us think of a bad thing, we might answer in a way that shows we are worried about that bad thing. For one case, if a person asks if you saw the broken glass, your mind goes to the idea of glass that is broken. This makes you more ready to say yes, even if you did not see it, because your brain is looking for that broken glass. Next, we look at this against a question that does not use those strong words. If the person asks if you saw the cars hit each other, your mind goes to the hitting, not just the glass. The way the question is put changes what you remember or what you think is true. This means that the answer you give is not just about what happened, but also about how the question was said. Finally, we understand that we are not just giving facts. We are also moving our mind because of the words we hear. So the shape of the question can pull the answer in a certain way.

english_query: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
ugf_response: First, we think about two people who want to do something together. They make a promise to each other to do certain things. To see if this promise stays strong, we look at what each person gets from it. If the things they get are good and they both feel they are getting enough, the promise might stay. We must look at the things they want. Second, we look at what happens if one person breaks the promise. If the hurt from breaking the promise is very big, the people will try harder to keep it. If the hurt is small, they might not care as much. Third, we look at what happens if they can find someone else to do the same thing. If it is easy to find a new person to do the thing with, then the promise they have now is not as strong. If it is hard to find a new person, the promise stays strong. The thing after the third step is to look at how much they trust each other. If they think the other person will do what they say, they will keep going. If they think the other person will lie, the promise will break. Finally, we see how much it takes from each person to keep the promise. If what it takes is too much for one person, they will stop. This tells us why some things stay together and why some things break.

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response:
The first idea in this case is that a person has already given a lot of money or time to a thing. The second idea is that the person decides to give more money or time to the same thing just because they have already given so much. The person thinks that if they stop now, the first money or time was lost for no good reason. So they think the only good way is to keep going until the thing is done.

This thinking is not good. The money or time already spent is gone. It cannot come back. It should not change what we do next. We should only look at what will happen if we spend more now. If the new spending will not help us get what we want, we should stop. If we keep spending just to save the first spending, we will lose even more. This is a bad way to think because it makes us throw good money after bad. We should look at the future, not the past.

english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who has ten pieces of gold. If that person loses five pieces of gold, they will feel very, very bad. The hurt of losing those five pieces is very great. Now, imagine a different person who has nothing. If that person gets five pieces of gold, they will feel happy. But the happy feeling is not as great as the bad feeling from the first person. The bad feeling from losing is much bigger than the happy feeling from getting the very same number of things.

The hard question is why our minds work this way. Why does the hurt of losing something we have feel more strong than the happy feeling of getting something new? Why are we not even about the things we get and the things we lose?

Some people think this happens because of how we stay alive. In the old days, when people lived in the wild, losing food meant you might die. Getting extra food was good, but it did not stop you from dying right then. So, our minds learned to pay much more attention to things that could hurt us. We became very good at looking for things that take away what we have, because that keeps us alive.

Other people think this happens because of how we see the world. When we have something, it becomes part of who we are. It feels like it belongs to us. When it is gone, it feels like a part of us is gone. This makes the thing being gone feel much worse than just getting something that was not there before. We are not just losing a thing, we are losing a part of our life.

english_query: how to think about what could happen and how likely it is
ugf_response:
Imagine you are sitting in a quiet room and you try to think about a thing that may happen later. You want to know what may happen and how many times it may happen. This is a hard thing to think about because the future is not set like a story that we have already read.

The hard thing is to find a way to think about how many times something may happen. First, some people say we should look at what has happened before and use that to guess what may happen next. They think that if something has happened many times in the past, it may happen many times again. Second, some people say we should think about all the different ways it could happen and add up all of them. They feel that the more ways there are, the more often it may happen. Third, some people say we should trust a feeling inside us, a deep feeling, and not try to add up at all. They think that a feeling can tell us when something will happen more often.

Why do people give these different replies? The first group trusts what we have seen, because what we see gives us a picture of what has been true before. The second group likes to think about many possible ways, because they want to be sure they have not missed a way that could change the whole number of things. The third group trusts a feeling because they think a feeling can see things that numbers cannot, and they do not want to be stuck in a long line of past pictures.

Each reply has a reason that makes sense to the person who says it. The first one feels safe because it rests on what we have already seen. The second one feels right because it tries to add up all the ways. The third one feels quick because it does not need a long line to be made. In the end, the hard thing stays the same: we must choose a way to think about what may happen and how many times it may happen, and we must live with the fact that no way can give us the very same answer for every case.

english_query: how to think about what is fair when people start in different places
ugf_response:

Person 1: I see. So doing what is right means helping those who are behind.

english_query: when helping the group costs you but helps everyone
ugf_response: First, we must look at what it means when a person gives something of themselves to help a whole group of people. english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response:
We see a person who is looking for a feeling that stays inside for a long time, not just a quick laugh or a quick smile. The person sits in a room or walks in a place with trees and thinks about what makes the heart feel full in a way that does not fade when the next thing comes. The mind goes on and on, looking for a reason that can hold on when the fast things go away. The question asks us to look past the quick fun and to find a reason that can stay when the noise stops. It also asks why we think one thing can stay while another does not, and whether we can even know the true answer.

First, many people say that a strong love from a friend or a family member is the best way to feel that deep happy feeling. They point to the way a close hold or a kind word can stay in the mind long after the words are said, and they say that the feeling comes from the way we join with another person and feel that we are not alone.

Second, another group says that doing something good for another person can bring the deep feeling. They tell about a time when they helped a child or gave food to a stranger and felt a warm feeling that did not fade quickly. They think that the act of giving and seeing the other person smile makes a feeling that stays because it shows that we can make the world a little better.

Third, a third kind of answer comes from people who think that getting better at a thing that you can do or at the thing you try to get can be the place it comes from. They speak of a time when they learned to play a song on a thing that makes music or finished a big work at a job and felt a strong happy feeling about me that lasted. They say that the change we see in me and you, the way we become better at something, can be a strong place for long lasting happy feeling.

Next, another idea comes from those who feel that being part of a group or a big story can bring the deep feeling. They talk about being in a group that works together on a cause, or feeling part of a big story that is bigger than any one person. The sense that we belong to something larger can make a feeling that stays, because it ties the heart to many other hearts.

After that, a simple and quiet answer is given by some who say that sitting alone in a calm place, looking at the sky or listening to wind, can bring a soft, long lasting happy feeling. They point out that this feeling does not need any other thing, it just comes from being still and feeling the world around us.

Each of these answers is given because the person who says it has felt that way me or you, or has watched someone else feel that way. The love answer comes from the need to feel safe with others. The give‑away answer comes from the need to see that we can help. The getting‑better answer comes from the need to see that we can grow. The group answer comes from the need to feel we are part of a larger story. The quiet answer comes from the need to feel calm when all noise stops. All of these ideas try to point to a way that a feeling can stay long after the first smile has gone. The question stays open, and each person may pick the idea that fits best with the way they have lived and the way they see the world.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response: First, we must think about how a person sees the world. A person does not just look at things like a camera. Instead, a person uses what they already know to make sense of what they see. Second, when a person sees something new, they try to put that new thing into the group of things they already know. This means that the things a person thinks are true before they see something new will act like a way to shape how they see that new thing. The last step shows that the old thoughts act like a set of glasses that change the color and shape of everything the person looks at.

english_query: why saying something over and over does not make it true
ugf_response:
Person number one: Why do some people think that saying the same thing many times makes it true?

Person number two: It is a way the mind works. When we hear a thing many times, it feels easy to think about. Our minds like things that are easy to think about.

Person number one: But does being easy to think about mean the thing is real?

Person number two: No, it does not. Just because a thought comes to your head without work does not mean it is a true thing about the world.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who must choose between two ways of doing something. They see one way and they see another way. They believe these are the only two ways that can ever be. They think that if they do not pick the first way, they must pick the second way. This is a way of thinking that can lead to many ways of being wrong. It makes the world look much smaller than it really is.

The hard question is this: how do we know if we have found all the ways to do something? How can we be sure that there is not a third way or a way after the third or a way that we have not even thought of yet? When we think there are only two paths, we stop looking for more. We stop using our minds to find the best way. We only look at what is right in front of us.

Some people might say that it is okay to think this way when we are in a hurry. They might say that if we have to make a choice right now, we should just pick one of the two things we see. They think that finding more ways takes too much time and that the two ways we have are good enough. They want to move fast and not get stuck.

Other people might say that this way of thinking is very bad. They think it makes people fight more. When people think there are only two ways, they often think one way is good and the other way is bad. This makes them hate the people who pick the other way. They believe that if we look harder, we will find many more ways to live together. They believe that finding more ways can make everyone happier.

Another group of people might say that we must always be careful. They think that we should never believe there are only two ways unless we have looked at every single thing that can be. They say that our minds are not good at seeing everything at once. They think we must work hard to find the many ways that are there so we do not make a bad choice.

english_query: what makes a good reason for believing something
ugf_response:
You want to know what makes it okay to say that something is true. When you think a thing is true, you need a good way to show why you believe it. This is not just about having a feeling in your heart. It is about having a way to show that your thought is right and not just a dream or something that went wrong.

The hard question is this: what is the best way to know that what we think is the truth? How do we know that our way of seeing the world is the same as the world itself? If we see something, does it mean it is there? If we think something, does it mean it must be so? We want to know if we can ever be sure that our thoughts are the same as what is real.

Some people say that we must only believe things that we can see or touch or find with a way to see how big or small they are. They think that if you cannot use your eyes or your hands to find a thing, you should not say it is true. They want to see the things themselves. They think that if many people see the same thing at the same time, then it must be true. This way of thinking helps us build big things and make machines work, because the things we see stay the same.

Other people think this way is too small. They say that some of the most important things in life cannot be seen. For one thing, they might think about love or the way a person should act toward others. You cannot see love under a glass or touch it with your hands, but people feel it is very real. These people say that we can know things through our feelings or through the way we think about what is good. They believe that our minds can find truths that our eyes cannot see.

There are also people who say that we should look at how our thoughts work together. They do not just look at one thing. They look at how one thought leads to another. They think that if a group of thoughts all point to the same thing, then it is possible to be true. They think that if you start with something that is true and follow a good way of thinking, you will end up at the truth. english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response:
When we want to know if one thought follows from another, we are looking to see if the first thing makes the second thing true. We must look at the way the pieces of our thought fit together.

First, we must look at what we say is true at the start. Let us call these starting points our first group of thoughts. These are the things we say we know for sure. If these starting points are not true, then the rest of our thinking might not be true either.

Second, we look at the next thought that we say is true. We must ask if this new thought must be true because of the first group of thoughts. We do not ask if the new thought is true in the world. We only ask if the new thought must be true if we believe the first group of thoughts.

To do this, we must look for a path between them. Imagine you have a box. You know that if you put something in the box, the box becomes heavy. Now, you see that the box is heavy. You cannot say for sure that you put something in the box, because maybe someone put a heavy stone in it, or maybe the box is just made of heavy wood. In this case, the heavy box does not follow from the idea of putting something in it.

However, if you know that all things in the room are the color of blood, and you see a thing in the room, you can say that it is a thing that cannot be wrong that the thing is the color of blood. In this case, the way the thing looks follows from the first thought. The first thought was that everything in the room is the color of blood. The second thought was that the thing is in the room. Because of these two, the third thought that the thing is the color of blood must be true.

If there is no way to get from the first thoughts to the next thought without adding new things that were not there before, then the second thought does not follow from the first. To tell if one thing follows from another, you must check if it is able for the first thoughts to be true while the next thought is not true. If it is not able for the first thoughts to be true and the next thought to be not true at the same time, then the second thought follows from the first.

english_query: how to check if your own thinking has problems

A not good part is that it can be very hard to find a group of what to do that everybody can say yes to, especially when people have different needs or live in different places. Some groups of what to do that seem needed for being not hurt or for main needs might not get a yes from every single person, and then the idea would stop us from using those groups of what to do. english_query: what makes a good reason for believing something
ugf_response:
When you think that something is true, you are making a choice in your head. You are saying that you believe a thing is real or that a thing will happen. But why do you say that? You cannot just say it is true because you want it to be true. You need a way to show that your thought is good. This is a very big thing to think about. The hard question is this. What makes a thought good enough to believe? How much do you need to see or know before you can say that something is real?
